meta.title: Smart Security Validation Platform (SSVP v1.0)
header.network.title: Current Network Summary
network.unavailable: Network summary is currently unavailable. You can still enter targets manually.
header.mainTitleHint: Use only on systems you own or have explicit permission for
sidebar.title: Operation Tabs
panel.legal.title: Risk, Outcomes, and Legal Terms
panel.legal.consent: I have read and accept the risks and legal responsibility.
scan.target.title: Target Input
scan.target.label: Targets (multiple IPs, range, CIDR, or domain)
scan.target.note: You can enter multiple targets separated by commas, spaces, or new lines.
scan.tool.title: Select Scan Tool
scan.tool.note: Continue with one of Nmap, Masscan, or netdiscover.
scan.tool.nmap.label: Nmap
scan.tool.nmap.description: Balanced scanning for service and port discovery.
scan.tool.masscan.label: Masscan
scan.tool.netdiscover.label: netdiscover
scan.tool.netdiscover.description: Host discovery on the local network (ARP-focused).
scan.params.title: Parameter Selection
scan.params.note: Select supported parameters for the chosen tool.
scan.ports.title: Port Selection
scan.ports.note: Ports are selected via checkboxes. Some tools may not need ports.
scan.start.title: Start Scan
scan.result.title: Scan Result
scan.result.initial: When ready, scan output will be added to the step outputs panel on the right.
direction.title: Progress Direction
direction.note.initial: Scan is complete. Now choose a progression direction.
direction.test.desc: Plan the next verification test flow.
direction.attack.desc: Move to a controlled attack validation flow.
right.ai.initial: AI analysis after scan will remain fixed here.
msg.profileSoon: Profile page will be added soon.
msg.logoutSoon: Logout action will be added soon.
msg.newTestNeedLegal: Complete legal approval before starting a new test.
direction.resetLocked: Reset is disabled because progression is completed.
direction.selectedLock: selected. Lock it with New Operation.
direction.selectFirst: Please select a progression direction first.
direction.locked: {direction} direction selected. This selection stays locked until reset.
scan.noSelection: No options available for this tool.
scan.noPortSelection: Port selection is not used for this tool.
scan.ports.manual.disabled: Manual port input is disabled while All is selected.
scan.ports.all.selected: All selected: other port selections are bypassed.
scan.note.noPorts: selected. This tool performs host discovery instead of port selection.
scan.note.ready: selected. Complete parameters and ports, then start scanning.
scan.required.targetTool: Target and scan tool are required.
scan.role.testRequired: Users without the test role cannot proceed to the scan screen.
scan.conflict.group: Only one option per group can be selected: {items}
scan.conflict.blocked: Some parameters were temporarily disabled because of a conflict.
scan.required.port: Select at least one port for this tool.
scan.running: Scan is running. Results will be added to step outputs on the right.
right.ai.none: No AI output because no result was received.
right.ai.error: No AI output because scan finished with an error.
right.ai.noAnalysis: No AI analysis was generated for this scan.
scan.result.done: Scan completed. Moved to Progress Direction tab.
report.title: Operation Results Report
report.empty: There is no operation output to export as PDF.
report.popupBlocked: The PDF window was blocked. Please allow popups.
catalog.fallback.test1: Open port validation and service requirement analysis
catalog.fallback.test2: Access rule validation for management ports
users.tab.title: User Management
users.panel.title: User and Role Management
users.panel.note: Only authorized accounts can use this panel.
users.error.noPermission: You do not have the user management role.
users.error.listLoad: User list could not be loaded
users.info.manager: Admin accounts are visible but cannot be modified.
users.confirm.delete: Do you want to delete user {username}?
